site.title: Pantone Color Converter
site.tagline: Instantly preview and share Pantone colors with dynamic OG images for LINE, Slack, and Facebook

home.shareOnSocialDesc: Copy a color page URL and paste into LINE, Slack, or Facebook. The platform auto-generates a rich preview card with the exact color.
home.apiIntegrationDesc: Call the OG image API to get a 1200x630 PNG of any Pantone color. Use in emails, docs, or embed in your own pages.
home.colorReferenceDesc: Browse all colors below. Click any card to see the full detail page with copyable URL and color information.
home.livePreviewDesc: This image is generated on-the-fly by the API. Try changing the URL parameter.

color.unknownDesc: The Pantone code "{code}" was not found in our database.

tabs.noResultsHint: Try a different search term or filter

compare.title: Color Comparison
compare.subtitle: Compare Pantone colors side by side and measure perceptual difference (Delta E)
compare.name: Name

palette.title: Palette Generator
palette.subtitle: Generate beautiful color palettes from any Pantone color
palette.empty: Select a color to generate palettes

wheel.title: Color Wheel
wheel.subtitle: Explore color harmonies on the interactive wheel

qrcode.title: Share QR Code
qrcode.scanToView: Scan to view this color on any device
qrcode.coloredQr: QR colored to match Pantone shade

palettes.title: Curated Palettes
palettes.subtitle: Hand-picked Pantone color palettes for designers
